name: vlanya-element-desktop
description: Vlanya Element desktop wrapper with Windows screen-share audio loopback.

scripts.build:window-audio-helper: dotnet publish native/window-audio-capture/Vlanya.WindowAudioCapture.csproj -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained true -p:PublishSingleFile=true -p:EnableCompressionInSingleFile=true -o native/window-audio-capture/publish
scripts.check: node --check src/main.js && node --check src/preload.js && node --check src/frame-audio-patch.js && node --check src/picker-preload.js && node --check src/picker.js
